    "Remove the non-compliant foam sealant.",

  "rationale": "The field inspection identified standard foam sealant used in locations where fire-rated sealant is explicitly required by IRC R302. Standard polyurethane foam does not meet the fireblocking integrity requirements for sealing penetrations in fire-resistance-rated assemblies.",
